RESPONDENTS SARAH ELKOTBEID, JESSICA ELKOTBEID, AND CHERRY ELISA CANENG ESTRADA ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D505)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-21-2026 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF JAN-21-2026 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.
